# Exyte

**Category:** EPC and Commissioning, Design and Engineering, Construction and Systems Integration
**Website:** https://www.exyte.net/Markets/Data-Centers

## Headline
Integrated data center engineering, design, and construction firm with relevance to modular, hyperscale, and colocation projects.

## Overview
Exyte belongs in the delivery side of the market map because it covers engineering, design, and construction at the integrated project level. It is useful when buyers need to evaluate execution partners, not just product suppliers.

## Key capabilities
- integrated engineering and construction
- data center project delivery
- relevance across modular and hyperscale environments

## Best fit for
- buyers comparing delivery partners
- large programs needing integrated execution
- teams where delivery quality is as critical as equipment choice
